_comment: Auto-repair fixture: stage 7b (docker end-to-end attack) failure at attempt 1. Stage 7b rebuilds the POC's API/db containers from patched source, seeds them, and re-runs the recorded attack. When the attack SUCCEEDS against the patched code the fix is inadequate and emitTrpJFailure is called with stage_label 'TRP8 docker attack' and FAILING_CMD 'attack SUCCEEDED against patched source'. Exit 66 → main context revises the bundle and retries.
